All 67 Counties

FHA loans & loan limits in every Florida county

We serve FHA home buyers and homeowners in all 67 Florida counties. For 2026, the single-family FHA floor is $541,287 (most counties), rising to $990,150 in Monroe County (the Keys); designated high-cost metros are above the floor. Always confirm your county's exact figure with HUD's official FHA loan-limit lookup. Pick your county below.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Florida for 2026?+
The 2026 single-family FHA floor is $541,287 (most counties), up to $990,150 in Monroe County. Designated high-cost metros are above the floor — confirm your county's exact figure with HUD.
Do FHA loan limits vary by county in Florida?+
Yes. HUD sets FHA limits by county based on local home prices. Most Florida counties are at the $541,287 floor; a handful of high-cost coastal and metro counties are higher.
Do you serve every Florida county?+
Yes — we provide FHA loans across all 67 Florida counties, from the Panhandle to the Keys.
